title: Chasing Shadows
caption: A study of soft window light and deep silver gelatin shadows on photographic paper.

title: The Restless Bench
caption: A short narrative video capturing fleeting interactions on a park bench at dusk.

title: Silent Echoes
caption: Geometric analysis of concrete forms casting deep shadows under a harsh mid-day sun.

title: Composition Study
caption: Bauhaus-inspired geometry charcoal sketches mapping spatial density and tension.

title: Light Study on Metal
caption: In-progress contrast exploration of light reflecting off polished and brushed sheet metal.

title: Urban Grid
caption: Street photography attempting to capture symmetrical night grid alignments.
reason: The geometry felt too rigid, losing the human texture and organic noise of the street.

title: The Water Flow
caption: Long-exposure video documenting fluid patterns in moving river current.
reason: Technical failure during exposure; chemical film canister was fogged beyond repair.
